name: px4-sim-suite-presentations
description: Marp presentation build tooling for px4-sim-suite

scripts.build:html: CHROME_PATH=$(which google-chrome 2>/dev/null || which chromium 2>/dev/null) npx marp -I . -o dist
scripts.build:pdf:processed: for f in $(find . -name '*.processed.md' -not -path './node_modules/*'); do out="dist/$(dirname $f)/$(basename $f .processed.md).pdf"; mkdir -p $(dirname "$out"); CHROME_PATH=$(which google-chrome 2>/dev/null || which chromium 2>/dev/null) npx marp --pdf --allow-local-files "$f" -o "$out"; done
scripts.build:pdf: npm run prerender && npm run build:pdf:processed
scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:pdf
scripts.preview: CHROME_PATH=$(which google-chrome 2>/dev/null || which chromium 2>/dev/null) npx marp --preview -I . -o dist
scripts.snapshot: CHROME_PATH=$(which google-chrome 2>/dev/null || which chromium 2>/dev/null) npx marp --images png --allow-local-files --image-scale 2 -I . -o dist
